item.title: Claude reads your codebase and design files to build your team's design system, then applies it auto...
item.description:
Claude reads your codebase and design files to build your team's design system, then applies it automatically, keeping every project on-brand.
Give it a try: https://t.co/C9iewmyMQs Read more: https://t.co/FHQUP6aejg
--- @claudeai | ❤️ 91 | 🔁 4 | 💬 3 | 👁 9649
item.author: @claudeai

item.title: Describe what you want, and Claude builds the first version. Refine through conversation, inline com...
item.description:
Describe what you want, and Claude builds the first version. Refine through conversation, inline comments, direct edits, or custom sliders.
Export to @canva, as PDF or PPTX, or hand off to Claude Code when the design feels right. https://t.co/EGZ2UmIm6m
--- @claudeai | ❤️ 265 | 🔁 9 | 💬 5 | 👁 19471
item.author: @claudeai

item.title: Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs: make prototypes, slides, and one-pagers by talking to C...
item.description:
Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs: make prototypes, slides, and one-pagers by talking to Claude.
Powered by Claude Opus 4.7, our most capable vision model. Available in research preview on the Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans, rolling out throughout the day. https://t.co/2BgBGtgYGX
--- @claudeai | ❤️ 1435 | 🔁 151 | 💬 193 | 👁 31563
item.author: @claudeai

item.title: “The sharpest drop came from people who used the model for direct answers, not from those who used i...
item.description:
“The sharpest drop came from people who used the model for direct answers, not from those who used it more like a hint system, which suggests the real issue is not AI exposure itself but replacing effort with completion.
The result is not that AI makes people less capable by default, but that answer outsourcing can shrink the mental effort that normally trains skill.”
Even more results on the dangers of outsourcing your thinking to AI.
--- @GaryMarcus | ❤️ 9 | 🔁 1 | 💬 2 | 👁 983
item.author: @GaryMarcus

item.title:
Researchers are refining ways to grow food for future missions! 🌱🫛
Veg-06 recently arrived to the s...
item.description:
Researchers are refining ways to grow food for future missions! 🌱🫛
Veg-06 recently arrived to the space station to study how spaceflight impacts plant-microbe interactions. A process that may provide the necessary nitrogen these plants need to grow. https://t.co/2K5uTeaM31
--- @Space_Station | ❤️ 76 | 🔁 19 | 💬 6 | 👁 5223
item.author: @Space_Station

item.author: @tunguz

item.title: String theory is retardmaxxing on a hard mode.
item.author: @tunguz

item.title:
What does a CIO need to know about architecting the agentic enterprise? #sponsored
4 architecture l...
item.description:
What does a CIO need to know about architecting the agentic enterprise? #sponsored
4 architecture layers every agentic enterprise needs: → Context: harmonized data → Work: composable business logic → Agency: reasoning + execution → Engagement: humans + agents, side by side
The model is not your moat. Architecture is.
Full CXO Spice conversation with @salesforce's Shibani Ahuja, SVP of Enterprise IT Strategy at Salesforce: https://t.co/7aEJ0QjMDF
#AgenticAI #CIO #AgenticEnterprise #SalesforcePartner #TDX26
--- @YuHelenYu | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 33
item.author: @YuHelenYu

item.title:
我有一个模糊的思考：我不适合做企业级的创业者，去创造开创性的业务。不是因为能力或经验，我觉得是因为牺牲。
和很多创始人打交道后发现，他们必须做出一定程度的牺牲。牺牲家庭时间，牺牲亲友时间，最基础也需...
item.description:
我有一个模糊的思考：我不适合做企业级的创业者，去创造开创性的业务。不是因为能力或经验，我觉得是因为牺牲。
和很多创始人打交道后发现，他们必须做出一定程度的牺牲。牺牲家庭时间，牺牲亲友时间，最基础也需要牺牲自己的娱乐个人爱好。但大多数真正的创业者心理是明白这种牺牲，而且也能够接受。因为他们的愿景更大，他们明白自己的付出会带来更大的回报。
但我还没有想好，也可能我还没有碰到那种值得自己牺牲的愿景出现。
其实任何事情都有牺牲和付出，不只是创业。高更也是 40 多岁忽然想清楚自己要去画画，就抛弃了所有东西。
--- @bearliu | ❤️ 6 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 577
item.author: @bearliu

item.title: china discount is real, damn https://t.co/tyQpMtEzPS
item.author: @swyx
